headline: Danushka Senadeera Photography wins Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year
standfirst: Danushka Senadeera Photography is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Danushka Senadeera Photography and the award record

Danushka Senadeera Photography is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Danushka Senadeera Photography, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

The public portfolio and directory sources present Danushka Senadeera Photography as a photography and videography brand. The GBE source supports the portfolio award claim. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year record matters

The Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year recognition places Danushka Senadeera Photography in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year.

Danushka Senadeera Photography's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Future updates to the Best Professional Photography Portfolio of the Year page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
